## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] DevOps/Infrastructure change
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues: Closes #123 -->

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test` / `pytest`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Tested locally with Docker Compose (`docker compose up`)
- [ ] Tested the affected API endpoints manually

## Screenshots / Demo
<!-- If this PR changes UI, include before/after screenshots -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (ESLint / Black / ruff)
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new/changed behavior
- [ ] Added or updated documentation where applicable
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive values committed
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
